info.title: This
info.description: converts all supported code documents into the --out (output file) .pdf file

options.name: --src
options.description: |  Source Code Directory. It will recursively include all files within it

options.name: --out
options.description: |  Output PDF File Path. Once the document has been generated, it will save it as a .pdf file to this path

options.name: --help
options.description:
|  Shows this page
--template -t  |  Select your own custom template file for code to be displayed on. See https://gitlab.com/jedsaxon/code2pdf for details about using custom templates
